creator: dumbbell@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi!

Your dpaste.com links have all expired :( Could you please attach the text files to this bug instead?

Regarding SNA, Intel pushes this method and it's enabled by default in the upcoming xf86-video-intel 3.0. So your problem should vanish once we update xserver to 1.14 (Real Soon Now™) and make this newer xf86-video-intel available.
